title: Katakuri Forces Luffy Past His Limit
description: On pages 11–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Reiju, Unknown person #10, Chiffon, Unknown person #11, Pudding as The escape from Totto Land tightens while Luffy’s duel with Katakuri becomes a test of endurance and will.
scene: The Sunny escape, Sanji’s cake plan, and Luffy’s mirror-world duel all converge under Big Mom’s pursuit.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your big plan is no secret to us.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Of course, your friends will be crushed before they can make it to cacao Island.

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: My little brothers and their battleships.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And they await you too, should you manage to make it out of here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will make it out of these mirrors. I promise.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What? Have you even been listening?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A Supreme Wedding Cake capable of stopping big mom in her tracks!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What a sublime fragrance...I feel faint!`)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We don't even need to put any poison in it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The delicious- mess will carry you straight to heaven,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm so glad... we made it in time.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You both made this possible! Thank you so much!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm sure I'll be able to save my friends!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Ah! Aha hahaha! I wonder about that!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We may have finished this cake, but! Your friends may already be dead, you know!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And even if they are alive, Mama may not even like this cake!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then we'll have carried this cake all this way for nothing, Sanji!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: How can you say that, pudding?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm wrong! I'm so wrong! How could I have said such a thing...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, we've gotta go meet up with them anyway.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I'll make the best cake ever,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and definitely make it out of these mirrors! HA-

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 48 dialogue beats. Big Mom’s pursuit, the cake delivery, and Luffy’s duel place every escape route under pressure.
